  • Classes in io.vertigo.core.locale used by io.vertigo.core.impl.locale
    Class
    Description
    LocaleManager
    The localization manager for applications managed by Vertigo, supporting multilingual or more specifically, multidictionary management.
    LocaleMessageKey
    Key for an externalized message.

    Class
    Description
    LocaleMessageKey
    Key for an externalized message.
    LocaleMessageText
    A Text that can be externalized in a resource file, based on the application's configuration settings.
